name: Google ADK
description: Builds and orchestrates multi-agent systems with a code-first Python and Java SDK plus CLI. Google's Agent Development Kit; powers Vertex AI Agent Engine deployments.

skills.name: Multi-Agent Orchestration
skills.description: Composes hierarchies of specialized agents with routing, delegation, and shared state in code.

skills.name: Code-First SDK
skills.description: Defines agents, tools, and workflows in Python or Java with a testable, code-first development model.

skills.name: Vertex Deployment
skills.description: Deploys ADK agents to Vertex AI Agent Engine for managed, scalable production hosting.
